hypothesis: If XGBoost models are trained to predict the difference (∆) between GFN1-xTB and DFT (PBE/HSE06) band gaps using the selected ST-135, RACs, and APRDF descriptors (top 400 features), then the ∆-learning models will produce significantly lower prediction errors for DFT band gaps than direct XGBoost models and will match or outperform fine-tuned deep learning benchmarks (MOFTransformer, CGCNN).
